candidate: KAREN-WEFT-NULL: dual-level null-space orthogonal LoRA (parameter null-space + activation orthogonal to warp tasks)

results.title: LoRA-Null via Null Space (2025/03)
results.rationale: LoRA-Null is exact twin at activation null-space level — KAREN-WEFT-NULL's activation-orthogonality component duplicates this.

results.title: Null-LoRA Null Space on Weights (2025/12)
results.rationale: Null-LoRA exact twin at weight null-space level — KAREN-WEFT-NULL's parameter null-space component duplicates this.

results.title: OPLoRA Double-Sided Orthogonal Projection (2025/10)
results.rationale: OPLoRA's double-sided orthogonal projection is functionally identical to KAREN-WEFT-NULL's dual-level constraint.

results.title: Subspace Geometry Catastrophic Forgetting LoRA (2026/03)
results.rationale: Geometric theory of forgetting via principal angles between subspaces underpins KAREN-WEFT-NULL.

results.title: O-LoRA Orthogonal Subspace Learning (OpenReview)
results.rationale: O-LoRA constrains tasks to orthogonal low-rank subspaces — direct functional twin of orthogonality mechanism.

results.title: Dual-LoRA Magnitude+Direction (2025/12)
results.rationale: Dual-level decomposition pattern is reused — different dimension but same dual-level framing.

results.title: Controlled LoRA Subspace Regularization CLoRA (ACL 2025)
results.rationale: CLoRA constrains null-space direction via pre-defined subspace — functionally similar regularization.

verdict_reason: 8 hits — far exceeds threshold of 1. Candidate is a recombination of LoRA-Null (activation null-space) + Null-LoRA (weight null-space) + OPLoRA (double-sided orthogonal projection) + O-LoRA (orthogonal subspaces) + CLoRA (subspace regularization). The dual-level construction (parameter + activation) is essentially OPLoRA's double-sided projection. Candidate itself explicitly admits 'Recombination of existing components'.
